work.desc_title: Epistles of Paul, the Catholic Epistles, and the Acts of the Apostles, according to the arrangement of the holy fathers

translation: As for the first treatise, oh Theophilus…

excerpt.as_written: وعند ذلك يكون عيشنا لله وننال الحياه العتيده مَع كافه قديسيّه واصفياه ومُختاريه وَنُجباه الآن ودايماً والي دهر الداهرين امين
translation: And then our life will be with God and we will gain the life which is to come with all His saints, His purified, His elect, and His distinguished ones, now and always and to the age of ages. Amen

note: The text contains numerous rubrics throughout for readings on various days of the year.

work.desc_title: Sections to be read from the Epistles of St. Paul on the feast days of the holy church

excerpt.as_written: رسايل السعيد بولس في اعياد الكنىسة المقدسه مما يورده مدار شهور السنه وتواريخها شهر ايلول اول عره السنه ذكر البار سمعان العمودي
translation: the Epistles of St. Paul on the feast days of the holy church which are cited throughout the months of the year and on these dates: The month of September, the first number of the year - commemoration of the blessed Simeon the Stylite

excerpt.as_written: وايضا يوم الجمعه من السبة السابعة وعشرين
translation: And another: On the Friday of Holy Week, the twenty-seventh

note: Ff. 142r-173r are divided overall into the months of the year, as is evident from the running titles, and contains for each month several readings and dates for each month on which various individuals are commemorated. Then follow after f. 173r the readings for other occasions of the year.

excerpt.as_written: فاين هُم اذاً الذين يجعلون تغلّب الكون والمولد ودور الزمان سوراً علي ارآ الكنيسه
translation: Where, then, are those who have made the universe, its origin, and the cycle of time to be placed as a wall over the views of the church…

excerpt.as_written: ونعني بالفضيله ونهرب من الرذيله حتي نتمتع بالخيرات الاجله بنعمه ربنا ايسوع المسيح ومحبته للبشر الذي له المجد والعز الي دهور الدهور امين
translation: And we ought to be concerned with virtue and flee from vice so that we might enjoy the good things to come by the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ and his love for all, to Whom be the glory and power to the ages of ages. Amen

excerpt.as_written: ويلي من ذلك اليوم المرعب وقد كان ينبغي ان نفرح اذا سمعنا ذلك
translation: That dreadful day is coming, and we should have rejoiced to have heard that…

excerpt.as_written: حتي نعيش هاهنا عيشاً للملكوت اهلاً ونفلت من العقوبات العتيده ونفوز بالخيرات المخلده بنعمه ربنا ايسوع المسيح ومودته للبشر الذي له المجد والعز والجلال مع الاب الذي لا ابتدآ له والروح المحيي ذي كل قدس الي جميع دهور الداهرين امين
translation: While we live here for the kingdom to come and we will be free from eternal punishments and gain everlasting good by the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ and his affection for all to Whom be the glory and power together with the Father who has no beginning and the Life-giving Holy Spirit forever. Amen

cataloguer.message: Texts identified and described as part of the NEH Sinai Data Portal project (2021-2024).
